creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
1. At books such as <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/dev-model/> or 
   <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/>

2. narrow the page until the Book menu button appears

3. click the button

Expected: 

4. a menu

Actual result: 

4. no menu

5. content fades
